name: (Set of 2) 24" x 30" Earth Abstract Framed Canvases Brown - Threshold™: Modern Vertical Wall Art, Digital Print
description:
Place these 24" x 30" Earth Abstract Framed Canvases from Threshold on a wall to evoke imagination and emotions. The set of 2 canvases boasts abstract shapes, colors, and brushstrokes to interpret the art in unique ways. This set of two 24" x 30" Earth framed canvases from Threshold looks great with other art themes.

Casual classics for house and home.
